subject: Q2 Hiring Plan — Need Your Sign-Off
content_preview: 42 open reqs totaling $12M annualized. Engineering (18) and Sales (12) are biggest buckets. Attached breakdown by BU. Need approval before Tuesday board prep call.

subject: FCA Condition 2 — Compliance Update
content_preview: UK team flagged that FCA Condition 2 (enhanced transaction monitoring) implementation is 2 weeks behind schedule. Not a showstopper yet but want you aware. SA's team is on it.

subject: Re: Q1 Preliminary Results
content_preview: Looks strong on revenue. Two questions: (1) What's the path to getting ODL corridors back to target? (2) Integration costs — is $15M overage a one-time thing or trend? Want to discuss before the board call.

subject: Santander Brazil-Mexico Update
content_preview: Call with Santander treasury team went well. They want to accelerate the corridor launch to April instead of May. Need BG to confirm we can resource this — requires pulling 2 engineers from Rail integration.

subject: RLUSD Institutional Allocation
content_preview: KKR interested in $50M RLUSD allocation for their digital asset strategy. Want a call with BG this week to discuss custodial arrangements and yield. IR team has context.

subject: Cross-Margin Milestone
content_preview: Hit 100th institutional client on cross-margin beta today. Adoption still below 35% target but trajectory is strong. Good talking point for investor conversations.

subject: SEC Matter — Final Documentation
content_preview: Final SEC settlement documentation signed and filed. Case is officially and fully closed. Comms team (KH) has the press statement ready for your review.

subject: SWIFT + Chainlink Pilot Results
content_preview: SWIFT published initial results from their Chainlink cross-chain pilot. 11,500 institutions participated. They're framing it as 'blockchain interoperability without crypto.' Full analysis in the competitive intel channel.

subject: Dubai DFSA Announcement — Comms Plan
content_preview: DFSA license approval expected this week. Comms plan attached — we want to announce same day. Need your quote approval and sign-off on the joint statement with DFSA.

subject: London Office Capacity
content_preview: We're at 94% capacity in London. Canary Wharf shortlist down to 2 options. Estimate $2-4M. Need exec team discussion this week — agenda item for Thursday?

subject: RLUSD Japan Launch Timeline
content_preview: SBI wants to confirm Q2 launch timeline for RLUSD cross-border settlements in Japan. Their regulatory window closes June 30. Asking if we can commit to May launch.

subject: Retention Alert — GTreasury Engineering
content_preview: 3 senior engineers from GTreasury's platform team have accepted external offers in the last 2 weeks. MK's team is investigating. Retention was at 97% but trending down in this pocket.
